title: ETH long 100x -8.05% (EN)
body:
📊 Verified P&L — ETH/USDT Long · 100x · −8.05% (4h24m)

The idea: longed ETH expecting a continuation push.

What happened: price stalled and chopped sideways for hours — the continuation never came, and the entry barely moved.

We post the losers too. Here's the honest lesson: price hardly moved, but on 100x the costs — fees and funding on that size — bled a flat trade into −8%. Leverage doesn't only amplify the move, it amplifies your costs. We cut it rather than keep paying to hold a thesis that wasn't playing out.

Losing trades aren't the problem. Holding a dead one is.

⚠️ Past result, not a prediction. High leverage = high risk of total loss. Educational only, not financial advice.

#RealResults
